name: openbao-vault
label: OpenBao Vault
description: OpenBao Vault is an identity-based system for securely managing and distributing secrets such as API keys, passwords, and certificates.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.name: server_url
fields.description: Specify the URL of the OpenBao Vault server to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.
fields.tooltip: Specify the URL of the OpenBao Vault server to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.

fields.title: Access Token
fields.name: token
fields.description: Specify the token of the OpenBao Vault to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.
fields.tooltip: Specify the token of the OpenBao Vault to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.

fields.title: Namespace
fields.name: namespace
fields.description: Specify the namespace of the OpenBao Vault to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.
fields.tooltip: Specify the namespace of the OpenBao Vault to which you will connect and perform the automated operations.

fields.title: Secret Engine Name
fields.name: secret_name
fields.description: Specify the secret engine name to be used for accessing the OpenBao Vault server.
fields.tooltip: Specify the secret engine name to be used for accessing the OpenBao Vault server.

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is set as True.
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is set as True.

operations.description: Get a list of all the accounts in the Vault.
operations.title: Get Credentials

operations.description: Get information about an account identified by its ID.
operations.title: Get Credentials Details

parameters.title: Secret ID
parameters.description: ID for which you want to retrieves the details of account that you have specified from the Vault.
parameters.name: secret_id
parameters.tooltip: ID for which you want to retrieves the details of account that you have specified from the Vault.

operations.description: It enables users to retrieve the password or SSH key of an existing account that is identified by its account ID.
operations.title: Get Credential

parameters.title: Secret ID
parameters.description: ID for which you want to retrieves the password of account that you have specified from the Vault.
parameters.name: secret_id
parameters.tooltip: ID for which you want to retrieves the password of account that you have specified from the Vault.

parameters.title: Attribute Name
parameters.tooltip: An attribute name among the available params from account id for whose value needs to be retrieved
parameters.name: attribute_name
parameters.description: An attribute name among the available params from account id for whose value needs to be retrieved
